name: Mes Olives Preferees (My Special Olives)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups plain Greek or Italian olives
4 cloves garlic, 5 cloves at most, barely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the olives in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Add to the jar shallots, garlic (4-5 cloves), a handful of fresh or dried herbs chopped or left whole, lemon juice, a few shakes of Worcestershire sauce, and a few drops of Tabasco or a few shakes of hot pepper flakes.
3. Pour olive oil into the jar to cover the olives and herbs completely, then seal the lid.
4. Shake the jar a couple of times to mix all ingredients well.
5. Leave the olives in the oil to plump up and absorb the aroma of the herbs. As you use them, replenish with more olives and repeat the mixture until it seems too tired to work.
6. The herb-scented oil is ready for brushing onto grilled foods as they finish or for other cooking purposes.
